code: import axiosClient from'./axiosClient';export const getMyNotificationsApi=userId=>axiosClient.get(`/notifications/my?userId=${userId}`);export const getUnreadCountApi=userId=>axiosClient.get(`/notifications/unread-count?userId=${userId}`);export const markNotificationReadApi=id=>axiosClient.patch(`/notifications/${id}/read`);export const markAllNotificationsReadApi=userId=>axiosClient.patch(`/notifications/read-all?userId=${userId}`);
